question: campaigns表一共有多少条记录
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns

question: 男性患者有多少人
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE gender='男'

question: 女性患者有多少人
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE gender='女'

question: 筹款状态为completed的项目有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE status='completed'

question: 筹款状态为active的项目有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE status='active'

question: 筹款状态为closed的项目有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE status='closed'

question: 广东省有多少个筹款项目
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE province='广东'

question: 北京市有多少个筹款项目
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE city='北京'

question: donations表共有多少条捐款记录
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM donations

question: 微信渠道的捐款有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM donations WHERE channel='微信'

question: 支付宝渠道的捐款有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM donations WHERE channel='支付宝'

question: 匿名捐款有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM donations WHERE is_anonymous=1

question: withdrawals表共有多少条记录
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM withdrawals

question: 提现状态为通过的有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM withdrawals WHERE status='通过'

question: 提现状态为拒绝的有多少条
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM withdrawals WHERE status='拒绝'

question: staff表共有多少名员工
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staff

question: 职位为组长的员工有多少人
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staff WHERE title='组长'

question: 职位为专员的员工有多少人
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staff WHERE title='专员'

question: hospitals表共有多少家医院
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hospitals

question: 三甲医院有多少家
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hospitals WHERE level='三甲'

question: diseases表共有多少种疾病
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diseases

question: regions表共有多少个大区
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions

question: teams表共有多少个团队
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teams

question: 70岁以上的患者有多少人
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE age>70

question: 目标金额为50000的项目有多少个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE target_amount=50000

question: 所有项目的总筹款金额是多少
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns

question: 平均每个项目筹款多少钱
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns

question: 筹款金额最高的项目是哪个
sql: SELECT campaign_id, patient_name, raised_amount FROM campaigns ORDER BY raised_amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: 筹款金额最低的项目是哪个
sql: SELECT campaign_id, patient_name, raised_amount FROM campaigns ORDER BY raised_amount ASC LIMIT 1

question: 捐款总金额是多少
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) FROM donations

question: 平均每笔捐款金额是多少
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(amount),2) FROM donations

question: 单笔捐款最高金额是多少
sql: SELECT MAX(amount) FROM donations

question: 各省筹款总额排名前5
sql: SELECT province, ROUND(SUM(raised_amount),2) AS total FROM campaigns GROUP BY province ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5

question: 各省项目数量排名
sql: SELECT province, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM campaigns GROUP BY province ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: 各捐款渠道的捐款总额对比
sql: SELECT channel, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS total FROM donations GROUP BY channel ORDER BY total DESC

question: 各捐款渠道的捐款笔数对比
sql: SELECT channel, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM donations GROUP BY channel ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: 按性别统计平均筹款金额
sql: SELECT gender, ROUND(AVG(raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns GROUP BY gender

question: 按筹款状态统计项目数量
sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM campaigns GROUP BY status

question: 按筹款状态统计总筹款金额
sql: SELECT status, ROUND(SUM(raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns GROUP BY status

question: 患者年龄分布，按10岁分段统计
sql: SELECT (age/10)*10 AS age_group, COUNT(*) FROM campaigns GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY age_group

question: 2024年每月的捐款总额趋势
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', donated_at) AS month, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) FROM donations WHERE donated_at LIKE '2024%' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: 2023年每月新增筹款项目数
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', created_at) AS month, COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE created_at LIKE '2023%' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: 每个疾病科室的项目数量
sql: SELECT d.department, COUNT(c.campaign_id) FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id GROUP BY d.department ORDER BY COUNT(c.campaign_id) DESC

question: 目标金额达成率超过100%的项目有多少个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE raised_amount >= target_amount

question: 平均每个项目的捐款人数
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(donor_count),2) FROM campaigns

question: 捐款人数最多的项目
sql: SELECT campaign_id, patient_name, donor_count FROM campaigns ORDER BY donor_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: 提现总金额是多少
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) FROM withdrawals

question: 平均提现金额是多少
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(amount),2) FROM withdrawals

question: 提现审核通过率是多少
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status='通过' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*100.0/COUNT(*),2) FROM withdrawals

question: 按职位统计员工人数
sql: SELECT title, COUNT(*) FROM staff GROUP BY title ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

question: 每位员工负责的项目数量排名前10
sql: SELECT staff_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM campaigns GROUP BY staff_id ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

question: 筹款金额超过目标金额的项目占比
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN raised_amount>=target_amount THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*100.0/COUNT(*),2) FROM campaigns

question: 各疾病类别的平均筹款金额
sql: SELECT d.category, ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id GROUP BY d.category

question: 住院类项目和门诊类项目的数量对比
sql: SELECT d.visit_type, COUNT(*) FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id GROUP BY d.visit_type

question: 2024年第一季度的总捐款金额
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) FROM donations WHERE donated_at>='2024-01-01' AND donated_at<'2024-04-01'

question: 各大区的总筹款金额排名
sql: SELECT r.name, ROUND(SUM(c.raised_amount),2) AS total FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id JOIN regions r ON t.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY total DESC

question: 各大区的项目数量
sql: SELECT r.name, COUNT(c.campaign_id) FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id JOIN regions r ON t.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.name

question: 各团队负责的项目数量排名
sql: SELECT t.name, COUNT(c.campaign_id) AS cnt FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: 各团队的总筹款金额
sql: SELECT t.name, ROUND(SUM(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY SUM(c.raised_amount) DESC

question: 三甲医院的筹款项目共有多少个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns c JOIN hospitals h ON c.hospital_id=h.hospital_id WHERE h.level='三甲'

question: 三甲医院项目的平均筹款金额
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN hospitals h ON c.hospital_id=h.hospital_id WHERE h.level='三甲'

question: 广东省三甲医院的筹款项目数量
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns c JOIN hospitals h ON c.hospital_id=h.hospital_id WHERE h.level='三甲' AND h.province='广东'

question: 肿瘤科疾病的筹款项目有多少个
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id WHERE d.department='肿瘤科'

question: 各疾病名称对应的项目数量排名前10
sql: SELECT d.name, COUNT(c.campaign_id) AS cnt FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id GROUP BY d.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

question: 筹款金额最高的前5个项目对应的医院名称
sql: SELECT c.patient_name, c.raised_amount, h.name FROM campaigns c JOIN hospitals h ON c.hospital_id=h.hospital_id ORDER BY c.raised_amount DESC LIMIT 5

question: 每个大区的平均筹款金额
sql: SELECT r.name, ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id JOIN regions r ON t.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.name

question: 捐款人数最多的前5个项目的疾病名称
sql: SELECT c.patient_name, c.donor_count, d.name FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id ORDER BY c.donor_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: 各省的三甲医院数量
sql: SELECT province, COUNT(*) FROM hospitals WHERE level='三甲' GROUP BY province ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

question: 每个团队的提现通过总金额
sql: SELECT t.name, ROUND(SUM(w.amount),2) FROM withdrawals w JOIN campaigns c ON w.campaign_id=c.campaign_id JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id WHERE w.status='通过' GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY SUM(w.amount) DESC

question: 北京大区下有多少个团队
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teams t JOIN regions r ON t.region_id=r.region_id WHERE r.name LIKE '%北京%'

question: 每位组长负责的项目数量
sql: SELECT s.name, COUNT(c.campaign_id) AS cnt FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id WHERE s.title='组长' GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: 微信渠道捐款最多的前5个项目
sql: SELECT c.campaign_id, c.patient_name, ROUND(SUM(d.amount),2) AS total FROM donations d JOIN campaigns c ON d.campaign_id=c.campaign_id WHERE d.channel='微信' GROUP BY c.campaign_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5

question: 各大区的提现通过率对比
sql: SELECT r.name, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN w.status='通过' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*100.0/COUNT(*),2) FROM withdrawals w JOIN campaigns c ON w.campaign_id=c.campaign_id JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id JOIN regions r ON t.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.name

question: 住院类疾病的总筹款金额
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id WHERE d.visit_type='住院'

question: 门诊类疾病的平均筹款金额
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id WHERE d.visit_type='门诊'

question: 每个大区筹款成功项目的数量
sql: SELECT r.name, COUNT(c.campaign_id) FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id JOIN regions r ON t.region_id=r.region_id WHERE c.status='completed' GROUP BY r.name

question: 内科疾病的筹款项目有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id WHERE d.department='内科'

question: 外科疾病的平均筹款金额
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id WHERE d.department='外科'

question: 各省的平均捐款金额
sql: SELECT c.province, ROUND(AVG(d.amount),2) FROM donations d JOIN campaigns c ON d.campaign_id=c.campaign_id GROUP BY c.province ORDER BY AVG(d.amount) DESC

question: 每个团队的平均项目筹款金额
sql: SELECT t.name, ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY AVG(c.raised_amount) DESC

question: 筹款完成率最高的前5个省份
sql: SELECT province, ROUND(AVG(raised_amount*100.0/target_amount),2) AS rate FROM campaigns GROUP BY province ORDER BY rate DESC LIMIT 5

question: 各大区下属团队数量
sql: SELECT r.name, COUNT(t.team_id) FROM teams t JOIN regions r ON t.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.name

question: 捐款总额最高的前3个省份对应的大区
sql: SELECT c.province, ROUND(SUM(d.amount),2) AS total, r.name FROM donations d JOIN campaigns c ON d.campaign_id=c.campaign_id JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id JOIN regions r ON t.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY c.province ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3

question: 每家医院的筹款项目数量排名前10
sql: SELECT h.name, COUNT(c.campaign_id) AS cnt FROM campaigns c JOIN hospitals h ON c.hospital_id=h.hospital_id GROUP BY h.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10
answer: [('重庆省人民医院', 163), ('重庆儿童医院', 159), ('上海市第一人民医院', 130), ('北京中医院', 114), ('上海儿童医院', 109)]

question: 三甲医院项目的提现通过率
sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN w.status='通过' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*100.0/COUNT(*),2) FROM withdrawals w JOIN campaigns c ON w.campaign_id=c.campaign_id JOIN hospitals h ON c.hospital_id=h.hospital_id WHERE h.level='三甲'

question: 筹款进行中的项目有哪些
sql: SELECT campaign_id, patient_name, raised_amount FROM campaigns WHERE status='active' LIMIT 10

question: 已经关闭的项目平均筹了多少钱
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns WHERE status='closed'

question: 哪个员工业绩最好
sql: SELECT s.name, ROUND(SUM(c.raised_amount),2) AS total FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1

question: 最近一个月新增了多少筹款项目
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE created_at >= date('now','-1 month')

question: 筹款效率最高的团队
sql: SELECT t.name, ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount*100.0/c.target_amount),2) AS rate FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY rate DESC LIMIT 1

question: 每个staff的平均筹款金额
sql: SELECT s.name, ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY AVG(c.raised_amount) DESC LIMIT 10

question: 捐款金额分布情况
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN amount<100 THEN '<100' WHEN amount<500 THEN '100-500' WHEN amount<1000 THEN '500-1000' ELSE '>=1000' END AS range, COUNT(*) FROM donations GROUP BY range

question: 哪个渠道的用户最慷慨
sql: SELECT channel, ROUND(AVG(amount),2) AS avg_amount FROM donations GROUP BY channel ORDER BY avg_amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: 项目成功率最高的省份
sql: SELECT province, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*100.0/COUNT(*),2) AS rate FROM campaigns GROUP BY province ORDER BY rate DESC LIMIT 5

question: 老年患者的筹款情况
sql: SELECT COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(raised_amount),2), ROUND(SUM(raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns WHERE age>=60

question: 儿童患者有多少
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM campaigns WHERE age<=14

question: 大病项目的筹款情况
sql: SELECT d.category, COUNT(*), ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount),2) FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id WHERE d.category='重症' GROUP BY d.category

question: 哪个大区表现最好
sql: SELECT r.name, ROUND(SUM(c.raised_amount),2) AS total FROM campaigns c JOIN staff s ON c.staff_id=s.staff_id JOIN teams t ON s.team_id=t.team_id JOIN regions r ON t.region_id=r.region_id GROUP BY r.name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1

question: 捐款最活跃的时间段
sql: SELECT strftime('%H', donated_at) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM donations GROUP BY hour ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5

question: 最难筹到钱的疾病类型
sql: SELECT d.category, ROUND(AVG(c.raised_amount*100.0/c.target_amount),2) AS rate FROM campaigns c JOIN diseases d ON c.disease_id=d.disease_id GROUP BY d.category ORDER BY rate ASC LIMIT 3
